title: crataegus oxyacantha f. auriculata
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha f. auriculata, also known as the Auriculated Hawthorn, is a specific cultivar of the Crataegus oxyacantha species, a flowering plant in the rose family. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which have been traditionally used to support cardiovascular health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The health benefits of Crataegus oxyacantha f. auriculata include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the health of the cardiovascular system.
